# PromptKit
> Expert-crafted system prompts for 200+ AI models. Copy, paste, and get optimized outputs for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Midjourney, and more. System prompts are derived from official documentation, whitepapers, and model cards.

## Text & Chat Models
- [OpenAI (GPT-5.5, GPT-5, GPT-4o, o-series)](https://promptkit.dev): System prompts for reasoning, structured outputs, code, tool use
- [Anthropic (Claude Opus 4, Sonnet 4, Haiku 4)](https://promptkit.dev): XML system messages, thinking mode, citations
- [Google (Gemini 3.5, 2.5 Pro, Gemma 4)](https://promptkit.dev): System instructions, Google Search grounding, thinking config
- [DeepSeek (R1, V4)](https://promptkit.dev): Reasoning mode, temperature ranges, tool use
- [Alibaba (Qwen3.7, QwQ, Qwen Max)](https://promptkit.dev): Chat template format, tool descriptions
- [Meta (Llama 4, 3)](https://promptkit.dev): System prompt structure, tool use format
- [Mistral AI (Mistral Large, Small)](https://promptkit.dev): System message guidelines, JSON mode
- [Zhipu AI (GLM-5, GLM-4)](https://promptkit.dev): Chinese-optimized prompt formats
- [ByteDance (Doubao, Seedream)](https://promptkit.dev): Seedream 4.0 image model, Doubao series
- [xAI (Grok)](https://promptkit.dev): Grok 3, Grok Imagine
- [Tencent (Hunyuan)](https://promptkit.dev): Hunyuan series prompts
- [Moonshot AI (Kimi K2)](https://promptkit.dev): Kimi K2 reasoning, K2.5 thinking mode
- [MiniMax (M3, MiniMax-Text)](https://promptkit.dev): MiniMax Text-01 and M3 image prompts
- [Cohere (Command A)](https://promptkit.dev): Command A7, Command R+
- [01.AI (Yi Series)](https://promptkit.dev): Yi-Lightning, Yi-Large prompts
- [Xiaomi (MiLM2)](https://promptkit.dev): MiLM2 series system prompts
- [Inception Labs (Mercury)](https://promptkit.dev): Mercury Coder diffusion LLM prompts

## Image Generation
- [Midjourney V7](https://promptkit.dev): Parameters (--v, --s, --p, --ar), raw mode, personalization
- [Black Forest Labs (Flux 2, Flux Pro, Flux Dev)](https://promptkit.dev): Guidance, aspect ratio, LoRA, Kontext editing
- [Stability AI (SDXL, SD 3.5, SD 2.1)](https://promptkit.dev): Community quality tags, negative prompts, CFG scale
- [OpenAI (GPT Image 2, DALL-E 3, 1.5, 1 Mini)](https://promptkit.dev): Multi-turn editing, style presets, quality/size params
- [Ideogram V3, V4](https://promptkit.dev): Text rendering, magic prompt
- [Recraft V3](https://promptkit.dev): Style control, brand colors, vector/SVG output
- [Adobe Firefly 3](https://promptkit.dev): Commercial safety, Firefly Image 3
- [Kuaishou (Kling Image)](https://promptkit.dev): Text-to-image, image-to-image
- [Google (Imagen 3)](https://promptkit.dev): Imagen 3 system prompts
- [Reve AI](https://promptkit.dev): Reve Image 1.0, review scoring

## Video Generation
- [OpenAI Sora 2](https://promptkit.dev): Text generation, camera motion, video-to-video
- [Kuaishou Kling 3](https://promptkit.dev): Text-to-video, image-to-video, motion dynamics
- [Runway Gen 4, Gen 3](https://promptkit.dev): Gen-4 ultra-realistic, Gen-3 Alpha
- [Pika 3.0, 2.0](https://promptkit.dev): Scene ingredients, Pikaffects
- [Luma AI Ray 2](https://promptkit.dev): Ray 2 text-to-video, image-to-video
- [Genmo Mochi 2](https://promptkit.dev): Mochi 2 video generation
- [Lightricks LTX Studio](https://promptkit.dev): LTX Video, LTX Studio long-form
- [Tencent HunyuanVideo](https://promptkit.dev): HunyuanVideo text-to-video
- [Shengshu AI Vidu](https://promptkit.dev): Vidu 2.0 text-to-video

## Vision & Multimodal
- [OpenAI GPT-5 Vision](https://promptkit.dev): Image analysis, structured outputs from visuals
- [Anthropic Claude Vision](https://promptkit.dev): Image understanding, PDF analysis
- [Google Gemini Vision](https://promptkit.dev): Video analysis, image understanding
- [Alibaba Qwen-VL](https://promptkit.dev): Qwen Vision-Language prompts

## 3D Generation
- [Tripo 3D](https://promptkit.dev): Text-to-3D, image-to-3D
- [Meshy 3D](https://promptkit.dev): Text-to-3D, image-to-3D, PBR textures
- [Stability AI (SV3D, Stable Zero123)](https://promptkit.dev): 3D object generation
- [TencentARC LRM](https://promptkit.dev): Large reconstruction model prompts

## Open-Weight Models
- [PixArt-Alpha](https://promptkit.dev): Text-to-image transformer model
- [OpenGVLab (MARS)](https://promptkit.dev): MARS text-to-video
- [CagliostroLab (Cagliostro)](https://promptkit.dev): Cagliostro by Maga_AI
- [HVision-NKU (CogView)](https://promptkit.dev): CogView-4 text-to-image
- [StepFun (Step-2)](https://promptkit.dev): Step-2 series prompts

## Research
- [Community Models](https://promptkit.dev): Community-sourced prompts
- [Research Section](https://promptkit.dev): Experimental and research models
